policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-appi-05 - Javascript Source Map Blob Storage URL'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Application+Insights#IncidentremediationApplicationInsights#drcp-appi-05 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Application Insights Disable Javascript Source Map
policyDefinition.description: This policy disables linking the Javacscript Source Map to a blob storage.
